method: Every unresolved district/city is estimated separately.
If current city candidate votes exist and are large enough, the current city share is used directly.
Low-count current city shares are blended with the prior city model.
If no current city share exists, fallback uses the last clean city-level model and first-round covariates.
Foreign +30pp scenario overrides only foreign unresolved vote to Keiko 65 / Roberto 35.
privacyNote: El exterior se muestra solo como agregado; no se publican paises ni ciudades del extranjero en este snapshot compacto.
